stemHtml: What can be said about a T-tail configuration and a low stabiliser position?

options.a: A T-Tail is more stabilising because it is less affected by downwash from the wing.
options.b: A T-tail is more stabilising because it is more affected by downwash from the wing.
options.c: A T-tail is less stabilising because it is more affected by downwash from the wing.
options.d: A T-tail is less stabilising because it is less affected by downwash from the wing.
